name: Seafood Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into 1-inch pieces.
2. Place all ingredients except casings in a food processor and pulse until coarsely chopped.
3. Alternatively, pass all the ingredients through a meat grinder fitted with medium holes.
4. Stuff the mixture into sausage casings or form 4 long sausages wrapped in plastic wrap.
5. Poach the sausages in gently simmering water for 5 minutes.
6. Drain and let cool.
7. If using plastic wrap, remove it once the sausages are cool.
8. Cut the sausages into 6-inch lengths.
9. To serve, grill or broil the sausages until heated through and skins are crisp.
